caption: The video captures a sequence of a large, white aircraft with red and blue accents on its tail and fuselage taxiing along a runway. The plane is moving forward steadily, its landing gear firmly on the ground. In the background, two other similar aircraft are visible, parked or stationary on the tarmac. The sky appears overcast, suggesting cloudy weather conditions. The surrounding area includes grassy patches and some airport infrastructure, indicating that this scene takes place at an airfield. The aircraft's lights are on, enhancing visibility as it maneuvers along the runway.
